title: R Setup and Initialization Process
description: A flowchart showing the sequential steps for a beginner to install, configure, and run their first R session.
elements: Run a simple command (e.g., print('Hello World'))
relationships: Install R from CRAN leads to Install RStudio IDE
Install RStudio IDE leads to Open RStudio
Open RStudio leads to Install a package
Install a package leads to Run a simple command
Run a simple command leads to View results in Console
